findings.recommendation: Investigate error conditions (invalid node IDs, missing DAG, permission issues)

findings.description: 81.0% of orient commands followed directly by another orient (without reading output)
findings.recommendation: After orient, users often re-orient without reading output. Add context hints or next-step prompts.

findings.description: 8 documented flags are never used in observed workflows
findings.recommendation: Improve flag visibility in help text, add examples in README, or consider removing/aliasing unused flags

findings.description: 100.0% of errors are not immediately retried
findings.recommendation: Provide clearer error messages with recovery suggestions
